channel.title: SPOT — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on SPOT (Spotify) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Polen Capital: ADDED SPOT (+547%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) added SPOT in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Lee Ainslie: NEW POSITION SPOT (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) new position SPOT in Q4 2025 · 0.8% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Lee Ainslie)

item.title: Stephen Mandel: NEW POSITION SPOT (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) new position SPOT in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
